evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Establish data governance, quality testing, and mentoring for junior team members
evidence.domain_risk: Partner consultatively with Product, Go-to-Market, and business teams on data-driven insights
evidence.data_team_maturity: Design, build, test, and maintain end-to-end data models within dbt-powered systems
evidence.jd_authorship: Design, build, test, and maintain end-to-end data models within dbt-powered systems
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Partner consultatively with Product, Go-to-Market, and business teams on data-driven insights
evidence.autonomy_level: shift the team from reactive support toward proactive strategy, addressing complex data architecture while enabling organizational self-serve capabilities
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: shift the team from reactive support toward proactive strategy
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Shifting an existing team from reactive support to proactive strategy is about improving and scaling how the current function operates, not building new infrastructure from scratch.
evidence.work_arrangement: Lisbon, Portugal (Hybrid) — in-office Mondays, Tuesdays, Thursdays; remote Wednesdays and Fridays
evidence.ai_role: Implement AI data agents and automation for reporting and alerting systems
evidence.ai_role_explanation: The role requires building AI data agents and automation infrastructure, not merely using AI coding tools, so ai_enabler fits better than the previous 'none' classification.
evidence.testing_framing: Establish data governance, quality testing, and mentoring for junior team members
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Establish + quality testing indicates candidate owns quality practice as core responsibility.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Data governance and quality testing frame reliability/stability concerns, but lack explicit compliance or regulatory language.
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Five rigour signals (testing, quality, governance, clean data, SSOT, mentoring) present with zero velocity signals.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: B2B SaaS role affecting business metrics (ARR, NRR, churn) without explicit regulatory, compliance, or financial reporting implications.
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Established tools (dbt, Airflow, AWS stack) and infrastructure with ongoing enhancement toward self-serve capabilities.
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Technical specificity (dbt, AI data agents, self-serve solutions) mixed with generic stakeholder management language.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The role explicitly serves Product (product stakeholder) and Go-to-Market (commercial stakeholder), plus enables self-serve for the data team (internal_data stakeholder).
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The role combines strategic direction-setting ('shift toward proactive strategy', 'establish governance') with execution-focused responsibilities (design, build, maintain models).
